title: poa palustris subsp. volhynensis
intro: Poa palustris subsp. volhynensis, also known as Volhynian wet meadow grass, is a subspecies of the wet meadow grass, a type of grass that thrives in moist environments. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa palustris subsp. volhynensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for various skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
